notes: Dependency-ordered inventory of all SQL/TS artifacts across phases 01-07. Status values: pending|applied|verified|deferred|blocked. Update status field manually after each execution.

status_key.pending: Not yet applied to live DB
status_key.verified: Applied and validation SQL returned PASS
status_key.deferred: Intentionally not applied yet (awaiting upstream decision)
status_key.blocked: Cannot apply until named dependency is resolved
